meaning: n.罐头工厂,食品加工厂,屠宰加工厂
examples: They came from an apple packinghouse.
Five years ago, I was struck by the parallels with accounts of Chicago packinghouse life in the 1890s.
It owns over 275, 000 sows, twice as many as its closest rival, Carroll's Foods, plus 6 million hogs at various stages in the journey from birth to packinghouse.
